text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the Satsuki Sho, Agnes Tachyon
suddenly holds a press conference, during which
she announces she'll be taking an indefinite hiatus
from racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon may have lost out at the Satsuki
Sho, but she's still the favorite in two upcoming
races. Why do this? Refusing to explain herself,
she ends the press conference as abruptly as she
announced it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having won the Satsuki Sho with her incredible
running, Agnes Tachyon was on her way to
becoming a triple crown holder. So, why do this?
Refusing to explain herself, she ends the press
conference as abruptly as she announced it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, Agnes Tachyon asks for permission
to become Manhattan Cafe's advisor, of all
things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't figure out what Agnes Tachyon is up to.
However, with Manhattan Cafe taking up her
offer, we end up tackling the road to the Classics
as a trio.
